list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM observex.metrics ORDER BY tenant_id

list.name: metric
list.label: Metric
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT metric_name FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' ORDER BY metric_name

list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT labels['service.name'] FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND labels['service.name'] != '' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t, metric_name, avg(value) AS v FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND metric_name IN (${metric:sqlstring}) AND (labels['service.name'] IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime GROUP BY t, metric_name ORDER BY t
SELECT metric_name, count() AS samples FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT toStartOfInterval(received_at, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t, labels['service.name'] AS service, count() / $__interval_s AS rate FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND received_at >= $__fromTime AND received_at < $__toTime GROUP BY t, service ORDER BY t

SELECT timestamp, metric_name, value, labels['service.name'] AS service FROM observex.metrics WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
